---
title: "Survey_Report"
---
# Perform basic analyses, output figures and tables for Survey data

# Use modelled means

``` {r BasicStats}
### Limit data to March through June samples to reduce seasonal bias
ShellHeights_1 <- ShellHeights_ALL %>%
  filter(month(TripDate) > 02 & month(TripDate) < 07)

Quadrats_1 <- Quadrats_ALL %>%
  filter(month(TripDate) > 02 & month(TripDate) < 07)

### Provides how many were measured for each size class for each quadrat
SHMeasures <- ShellHeights_1 %>%
  group_by(QuadratID) %>%
  summarize(TotalNumMeasured = sum(!is.na(ShellHeight)),
            Count_Spat_1_to_30 = sum(ifelse(ShellHeight >= 1 & ShellHeight <= 30, 1, 0), na.rm = TRUE),
            Count_Seed_31_to_75 = sum(ifelse(ShellHeight >= 31 & ShellHeight <= 75, 1, 0), na.rm = TRUE),
            Count_Legal_76_plus = sum(ifelse(ShellHeight >= 76, 1, 0), na.rm = TRUE)
  )

### Provide stats for how many live oysters there were in each quadrat, by size class
QuadStats <- left_join(Quadrats_1, SHMeasures, by = c("QuadratID")) %>%
  mutate(
    Num_Spat_1_to_30 = if_else(TotalNumMeasured == 0, 0, (Count_Spat_1_to_30 * NumLive) / TotalNumMeasured),
    Num_Seed_31_to_75 = if_else(TotalNumMeasured == 0, 0, (Count_Seed_31_to_75 * NumLive) / TotalNumMeasured),
    Num_Legal_76_plus = if_else(TotalNumMeasured == 0, 0, (Count_Legal_76_plus * NumLive) / TotalNumMeasured),
    LiveDeadRatio = ifelse(is.null(NumLive) | is.null(NumDead) | is.na(NumLive) | is.na(NumDead) | (NumLive + NumDead == 0), 
                           0,
                           NumDead / (NumLive + NumDead))) %>%
  select(-starts_with("Count_")) # Remove Count columns as they are no longer needed

# remove intermediate data frames
# rm(ShellHeights_ALL, ShellHeights_1, Quadrats_ALL, Quadrats_1)

```

``` {r SampleWeightStats}
# Analysis indicates that Historic and Restoration data should be modeled separately

# Figure out which data distribution to use
# All
hist(QuadStats$TotalWeight)
# Historic
hist(subset(QuadStats, ProjectGroup == "Historic Uncultched")$TotalWeight)
# NFWF-2021
hist(subset(QuadStats, ProjectGroup == "NFWF-2021")$TotalWeight) 

### Historic Model ###
# Gamma out performed Gaussian
# Zero-inflation did not improve model fit
# Leaving out Random effect of Location was very detrimental to the model
TotalWeight_Historic <- glmmTMB(TotalWeight ~ factor(Year) + (1 | FixedLocationID), # Best
                      family = Gamma(link = "log"), 
                      data = QuadStats,
                      subset = ProjectGroup == "Historic Uncultched")

# Check goodness of fit
simulateResiduals(Weight_ma3, n = 1000, plot = T)

# Look at summary
summary(Weight_ma2)


### Restoration Model ###
## NFWF-2021 ##
# Gamma out performed Gaussian
# Zero-inflation did not improve model fit
# Leaving out Random effect of Location was very detrimental to the model

Weight_ma1 <- glmmTMB(TotalWeight ~ factor(Year),
                      family = Gamma(link = "log"),   
                      data = QuadStats,
                      subset = ProjectGroup == "NFWF-2021")

Weight_ma2 <- glmmTMB(TotalWeight ~ factor(Year),
                      family = Gamma(link = "log"),  
                      ziformula = ~1, 
                      data = QuadStats,
                      subset = ProjectGroup == "NFWF-2021")

Weight_ma3 <- glmmTMB(TotalWeight ~ factor(Year) + (1 | FixedLocationID), # Best
                      family = Gamma(link = "log"), 
                      data = QuadStats,
                      subset = ProjectGroup == "NFWF-2021")

Weight_ma4 <- glmmTMB(TotalWeight ~ factor(Year) + (1 | FixedLocationID),
                      family = Gamma(link = "log"),
                      data = QuadStats,
                      subset = ProjectGroup == "NFWF-2021",
                      na.action = na.omit)

Weight_ma5 <- glmmTMB(TotalWeight ~ factor(Year),
                      family = gaussian(link = "log"),   
                      data = QuadStats,
                      subset = ProjectGroup == "NFWF-2021")

Weight_ma6 <- glmmTMB(TotalWeight ~ factor(Year) + (1 | FixedLocationID),
                      family = Gamma(link = "log"),
                      ziformula = ~0, 
                      data = QuadStats,
                      subset = ProjectGroup == "NFWF-2021")

# Compare all models
aictab(list(Weight_ma1, Weight_ma2, Weight_ma3, Weight_ma4, Weight_ma5, Weight_ma6))

# Check goodness of fit
simulateResiduals(Weight_ma3, n = 1000, plot = T)
simulateResiduals(Weight_ma6, n = 1000, plot = T)
simulateResiduals(Weight_ma4, n = 1000, plot = T)



# Look at summary
summary(Weight_ma2)



```

``` {r NumLiveStats}
# Analysis indicates that Historic and Restoration data should be modeled separately

# Figure out which data distribution to use
# Historic
hist(subset(QuadStats, ProjectGroup == "Historic Uncultched")$NumLive)
# NFWF-2021
hist(subset(QuadStats, ProjectGroup == "NFWF-2021")$NumLive)

### Historic Model ###
# Negative binomial out performed Poisson
# Zero-inflation did not improve model fit
# Leaving out Random effect of Location was very detrimental to the model
# Adding in extra nested structure to the random effects improved AIC and ultimately DHARMa, but keeping Section as a fixed effect was best
# Adding in dispformula = ~ SectionName improved fit, suggesting that variance is different between sections, but so are means. Preference for the simpler model meant leaving that out
NumLive_Historic <- glmmTMB(NumLive ~ factor(Year) * factor(SectionName) + (1 | FixedLocationID/QuadratID), 
                       family = nbinom2,   
                       data = QuadStats,
                       subset = ProjectGroup == "Historic Uncultched")

# Compare all models
#aictab(list(NumLive_Historic,NumLive_Historic2))
# Check goodness of fit
simulateResiduals(NumLive_Historic, n = 1000, plot = T)

### Restoration Model ###
## NFWF-2021 ##
# Negative binomial out performed Poisson
# Zero-inflation did not improve model fit
# Leaving out Random effect of Location was slightly detrimental to the model
# Adding nested random effects did not improve AIC, thus simpler is chosen, but keeping Section as a fixed effect was best
NumLive_NFWF2021 <- glmmTMB(NumLive ~ factor(Year) * factor(SectionName) + (1 | FixedLocationID), # Best
                       family = nbinom2,  
                       data = QuadStats,
                       subset = ProjectGroup == "NFWF-2021")

# Check goodness of fit
simulateResiduals(NumLive_NFWF2021, n = 1000, plot = T)

# Look at summaries
summary(NumLive_Historic)
summary(NumLive_NFWF2021)

# Create dataframe to store 
####### Put the modeled means into a data frame for plotting
NumLiveStats_historic <- emmeans(NumLive_Historic, ~ Year * SectionName, type = "response") |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  mutate(ProjectGroup = "Historic Uncultched")

NumLiveStats_nfwf2021 <- emmeans(NumLive_NFWF2021, ~ Year * SectionName, type = "response") |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  mutate(ProjectGroup = "NFWF-2021")

NumLiveStats_modeled <- bind_rows(NumLiveStats_historic, NumLiveStats_nfwf2021) %>%
  rename(NumLiveMean = response,
         NumLiveLower = asymp.LCL,
         NumLiveUpper = asymp.UCL) %>%
  mutate(LiveMeanDensity = round((NumLiveMean * 4), 1),
         LiveLowerDensity = round((NumLiveLower * 4), 1),
         LiveUpperDensity = round((NumLiveUpper * 4), 1),
         NumLiveMean = round(NumLiveMean, 1),
         NumLiveLower = round(NumLiveLower, 1),
         NumLiveUpper = round(NumLiveUpper, 1)) %>%
  select(-SE, -df)

# Generate raw mean and SD
NumLiveStats_RAW <- QuadStats %>%
  group_by(Year, 
           ProjectGroup,
           SectionName) %>%
  summarise_ALL() %>%
  arrange(Year,
          ProjectGroup) %>%
  select(-matches("Num|Live|Weight|Drill"))

NumLiveStats_ALL <- left_join(NumLiveStats_modeled, NumLiveStats_RAW, by = c("Year", "ProjectGroup", "SectionName"))
# rm(NumLiveStats_historic, NumLiveStats_RAW, NumLiveStats_RAW, NumLiveStats_RAW)

```


``` {r Old OysterStats}
### Stats for Total Oyster Density and Total Weight Density by Year and ProjectGroup
QuadStats_ALL_Oys1 <- QuadStats %>%
  group_by(Year, 
           ProjectGroup) %>%
  summarise_ALL() %>%
  arrange(Year,
          ProjectGroup)



### Stats for Total Oyster Density and Total Weight Density by Year and Section and ProjectGroup
QuadStats_ALL_Oys2 <- QuadStats %>%
  group_by(Year, 
           ProjectGroup,
           SectionName) %>%
  summarise_ALL() %>%
  arrange(Year,
          ProjectGroup,
          SectionName)


### Stats for Total Oyster Density and Total Weight Density by Year and ProjectGroup
QuadStats_SizeClass_Oys <- QuadStats %>%
  group_by(Year, 
           ProjectGroup,
           SectionName) %>%
  summarise_ClassicSizeClass() %>%
  arrange(Year,
          ProjectGroup,
          SectionName)
# Convert from wide to long format
QuadStats_SizeClass_Oys_long <- QuadStats_SizeClass_Oys %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Density_Spat_1_to_30_Mean, 
             Density_Seed_31_to_75_Mean, 
             Density_Legal_76_plus_Mean),
    names_to = "Category",
    values_to = "Density") %>%
  # Ensure factors are ordered correctly
  mutate(SectionName = factor(SectionName, 
                              levels = c("W", "C", "E")),
         Category = factor(Category, 
                           levels = c("Density_Legal_76_plus_Mean", "Density_Seed_31_to_75_Mean", "Density_Spat_1_to_30_Mean")),
    Year = factor(Year))  # keeps years discrete and in order
  

##################### NOT SURE THE FOLLOWING IS NEEDED #########################
# Stats for Total Oyster Density and Total Weight Density by Year and Section
QuadStats_ALL_Oys4 <- QuadStats %>%
  group_by(Year,
           SectionName) %>%
  summarise_ALL() %>%
  arrange(Year,
          SectionName)

  # Median values
QuadStats_ALL_Oys4median <- QuadStats_ALL_Oys4 %>%
  filter(Year != ReportYear) %>%
  group_by(SectionName) %>%
  summarise(OysterDensityMedian = median(OysterDensityMean, na.rm = TRUE),
              LiveDeadRatioMedian = median(LiveDeadRatioMean, na.rm = TRUE),
              DrillDensityMedian = median(DrillDensityMean, na.rm = TRUE),
              WeightDensityMedian = median(WeightDensityMean, na.rm = TRUE))
################################################################################

# Prep data frame for creating SH distribution histogram
ShellHeightsReportYrX <- ShellHeights_1 %>%
  filter(!is.na(ShellHeight),
  Year == ReportYear) %>%

  mutate(ShellHeightBin = cut(ShellHeight, 
                              breaks = seq(0, ceiling(max(ShellHeight, na.rm = TRUE)) + 5, by = 5),
                              right = TRUE,
                              include.lowest = TRUE)) %>% # puts measures in 5 mm bins
  group_by(ProjectGroup) %>%
  mutate(ProjectTotal = n()) %>%
  group_by(ProjectGroup, ShellHeightBin, ProjectTotal) %>%
  summarise(ProjectNumberMeasured = n()) %>%
  mutate(PercentMeasured = (ProjectNumberMeasured / ProjectTotal) * 100)

ShellHeightsReportYr <- ShellHeights_1 %>%
  filter(Year == ReportYear) 

maxSH <- max(ShellHeightsReportYr$ShellHeight, na.rm = TRUE)


### Stats for LEGAL Oyster Density by Year and StationName
QuadStats_Legal_Oys1 <- QuadStats %>%
  group_by(Year, 
           ProjectGroup,
           StationName) %>%
  summarise_LegalONLY() %>%
  arrange(Year,
          ProjectGroup,
          StationName) %>%
  filter(ProjectGroup != "Historic Uncultched")

```

``` {r Survey Figures}

# Bar graph for mean substrate density  by Year and ProjectGroup

QuadStats_Substrate_fig <- ggplot(QuadStats_ALL_Oys1, 
                 aes(x = as.factor(Year), 
                 y = WeightDensityMean, 
                # color = ProjectGroup, 
                 fill = as.factor(ProjectGroup))) + 
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", 
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) + 
      scale_x_discrete("Year", 
                       expand = c(0.005, 0), 
                       guide = guide_axis(angle = -45)) +
      scale_y_continuous("Mean Sample Weight (kg / m2)", 
                         expand = c(0, 0),
                         limits = c(0, ceiling(max(QuadStats_ALL_Oys1$WeightDensityMean, na.rm = TRUE)) * 1.05),
                         breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 6)(c(0, ceiling(max(QuadStats_ALL_Oys1$WeightDensityMean, na.rm = TRUE))))) + 
      ggtitle("Mean Sample Weight by Year and Project Group") + 
      BaseForm +
      theme(legend.position = "bottom",
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0, vjust = 0)) 

print(QuadStats_Substrate_fig)
plot(QuadStats_Substrate_fig)


# Stacked Bar graph for past oyster densities, for historic Bars only

 # Create a complete grid for all years, sections, and projects
  df_complete <- expand_grid(Year = Years_Survey, SectionName = lv3, ProjectGroup = unique(QuadStats_ALL_Oys1$ProjectGroup)) %>%
    left_join(QuadStats_ALL_Oys2, by = c("Year", "SectionName", "ProjectGroup")) %>% 
    mutate(has_data = !is.na(OysterDensityMean), # Add a flag for missing data
           SectionName = factor(SectionName, levels = lv3))
  
  df_historic <- df_complete %>%
    filter(ProjectGroup == "Historic Uncultched")
  
Oyster_Density_Stacked_Historic_Fig <- QuadStats_SizeClass_Oys_long %>%
  filter(ProjectGroup == "Historic Uncultched") %>% # limits to Historic Uncultched only
  ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = Density, fill = Category)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
  # Add symbol for years with no data
    geom_point(
      data = subset(df_historic, !has_data),
      aes(x = as.factor(Year),
          y = ceiling(max(QuadStats_ALL_Oys1$WeightDensityMean, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.05),
          group = SectionName),
          shape = 4,   # X shape
          size = 4,
          stroke = 1.3,
          color = "black",
          inherit.aes = FALSE
          ) +
    facet_wrap(~SectionName, nrow = 1) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = c("Density_Spat_1_to_30_Mean" = "#a6cee3",
                 "Density_Seed_31_to_75_Mean" = "#1f78b4",
                 "Density_Legal_76_plus_Mean" = "#b2df8a"),
      labels = c("Legal", "Seed", "Spat")
    ) +
  
    labs(
      x = "Year",
      y = "Oyster Density (per m²)",
      fill = "Category",
      title = "Mean Oyster Density of Historic Bars by Section and Year") +
    BaseForm +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90", color = NA),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "top",
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -90, hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5))

print(Oyster_Density_Stacked_Historic_Fig)

# Stacked Bar graph for past oyster densities, for RESTORATION Bars only
Oyster_Density_Stacked_Restoration_Fig <- QuadStats_SizeClass_Oys_long %>%
  filter(ProjectGroup != "Historic Uncultched") %>% # limits to Historic Unculthed only
  ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = Density, fill = Category)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
    facet_wrap(~SectionName, nrow = 1) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = c("Density_Spat_1_to_30_Mean" = "#a6cee3",
                 "Density_Seed_31_to_75_Mean" = "#1f78b4",
                 "Density_Legal_76_plus_Mean" = "#b2df8a"),
      labels = c("Legal", "Seed", "Spat")
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "Year",
      y = "Oyster Density (per m²)",
      fill = "Category",
      title = "Mean Oyster Density of Restoration Bars by Section and Year") +
    BaseForm +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90", color = NA),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "top",
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -90, hjust = 1, vjust = 1))

print(Oyster_Density_Stacked_Restoration_Fig)

### Size Distributions
# Histograms

histogramY <- ggplot(ShellHeightsReportYrX, aes(x = ShellHeightBin, y = PercentMeasured, fill = ProjectGroup)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~ ProjectGroup, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_discrete(
    breaks = levels(ShellHeightsReportYrX$ShellHeightBin)[seq(1, length(levels(ShellHeightsReportYrX$ShellHeightBin)), by = 3)]
  ) +
  labs(title = paste0("Shell Height Distribution of Oysters Measured During ", ReportYear, " Survey"), 
       x = "Shell Height (mm)", 
       y = "Percent of Measurements Within Groups")  +
  BaseForm +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

histogramY

### Table of Legal Densities
Oyster_Legal_Density_Restoration <- QuadStats_Legal_Oys1 %>%
  filter(Year == ReportYear) %>%
  select(ProjectGroup,
         StationName,
         N,
         Density_Legal_76_plus_Mean,
         Density_Legal_76_plus_SD) %>%
  rename(Legal_Density = Density_Legal_76_plus_Mean,
         SD = Density_Legal_76_plus_SD)

kable(Oyster_Legal_Density_Restoration,
      caption = paste0("Mean density of legal-sized (Shell height > 75 mm) oysters on Restoration reefs surveyed in ",
                      ReportYear,
                      ". N indicates the number of quadrats included in survey. Density is expressed in number of oysters per square meter. SD = Standard Deviation."),
      col.names = c("Year",
                    "Project",
                    "Station Name",
                    "N",
                    "Mean Density",
                    "S.D.")
      )

```




``` {Survey Text}
### Placeholder for Survey text for report
```
This is text to output for Survey
